value.stringValue: {"mentions":[{"name":"Opportunity Tracker","id":"0F90W000001clAbSAI"}],"message":"@[{![Opportunity].Program_Manager__r.Id}] @[0F90W000001clAbSAI] The number of participants has changed to {![Opportunity].Number_of_Seats__c} for {![Opportunity].Name}"}
@[{!myVariable_current.Program_Manager__r.Id}] @[0F90W000001clAbSAI] The number of participants has changed to {!myVariable_current.Number_of_Seats__c} for {!myVariable_current.Name}

{"mentions":[{"name":"Opportunity Tracker","id":"0F90W000001clAbSAI"},{"name":"Darden Program Managers","id":"0F90W000001cl8JSAQ"}],"message":"@[0F90W000001clAbSAI] @[{![Opportunity].OwnerId}] @[0F90W000001cl8JSAQ] A PM has been requested to be assigned for {![Opportunity].Name}"}
@[0F90W000001clAbSAI] @[{!myVariable_current.OwnerId}] @[0F90W000001cl8JSAQ] A PM has been requested to be assigned for {!myVariable_current.Name}

{"mentions":[{"name":"Opportunity Tracker","id":"0F90W000001clAbSAI"},{"name":"Darden Program Managers","id":"0F90W000001cl8JSAQ"}],"message":"@[0F90W000001clAbSAI] @[{![Opportunity].OwnerId}] @[0F90W000001cl8JSAQ] {![Opportunity].Special_Event__r.Lead_Program_Manager__r.FirstName} {![Opportunity].Special_Event__r.Lead_Program_Manager__r.LastName} has been assigned as your PM for {![Opportunity].Name}"}

@[0F90W000001clAbSAI] @[{!myVariable_current.OwnerId}] @[0F90W000001cl8JSAQ] {!myVariable_current.Special_Event__r.Lead_Program_Manager__r.FirstName} {!myVariable_current.Special_Event__r.Lead_Program_Manager__r.LastName} has been assigned as your PM for {!myVariable_current.Name}

{"mentions":[{"name":"Opportunity Tracker","id":"0F90W000001clAbSAI"}],"message":"@[{![Opportunity].Program_Manager__r.Id}] @[0F90W000001clAbSAI] The program dates have changed to {![Opportunity].Delivery_Date__c} - {![Opportunity].Program_Departure_Date__c} for {![Opportunity].Name}. The estimated date flag is {![Opportunity].Estimated_Delivery_Date__c}"}

@[{!myVariable_current.Program_Manager__r.Id}] @[0F90W000001clAbSAI] The program dates have changed to {!myVariable_current.Delivery_Date__c} - {!myVariable_current.Program_Departure_Date__c} for {!myVariable_current.Name}. The estimated date flag is {!myVariable_current.Estimated_Delivery_Date__c}
{"mentions":[{"name":"Ekram Shohate","id":"0050W0000061CKuQAM"}],"message":"@[0050W0000061CKuQAM] The amount has changed to {![Opportunity].Amount} for {![Opportunity].Name}"}
@[0050W0000061CKuQAM] The amount has changed to {!myVariable_current.Amount} for {!myVariable_current.Name}
{"mentions":[],"message":"@[Jennifer Hicks] @[Ekram Shohate] @[Allison Forrest] @[{![Opportunity].OwnerId}] Last day to cancel hotel block is 30 days away."}
@[Jennifer Hicks] @[Ekram Shohate] @[Allison Forrest] @[{!myVariable_current.OwnerId}] Last day to cancel hotel block is 30 days away.

{"mentions":[{"name":"Opportunity Tracker","id":"0F90W000001clAbSAI"}],"message":"@[{![Opportunity].Program_Manager__r.Id}] @[0F90W000001clAbSAI] The location has changed to {![Opportunity].EE_Location__c} for {![Opportunity].Name}"}
@[{!myVariable_current.Program_Manager__r.Id}] @[0F90W000001clAbSAI] The location has changed to {!myVariable_current.EE_Location__c} for {!myVariable_current.Name}

{"mentions":[{"name":"Opportunity Tracker","id":"0F90W000001clAbSAI"}],"message":"@[{![Opportunity].Program_Manager__r.Id}] @[0F90W000001clAbSAI] The program format has changed to {![Opportunity].Program_Format__c} for {![Opportunity].Name}"}
@[{!myVariable_current.Program_Manager__r.Id}] @[0F90W000001clAbSAI] The program format has changed to {!myVariable_current.Program_Format_OLD__c} for {!myVariable_current.Name}

rules.name: myRule_20
rules.label: Stage changed to on hold or closed withdrawn

rules.name: myRule_29
rules.label: EE Reg Complete - Pay Later Selected

Flow.description: Added Contract Renewal Follow-up Reminder action.
Flow.label: Opportunity Tracker

value.stringValue: This is your reminder to send a follow-up for this contract renewal.
